abbreviations.definition: decrease (single crochet 2 together or invisible decrease)
increase (2 single crochet in one stitch)

materials: Worsted/aran (#4) weight yarn in your choice of color

rounds.summary: Create a magic ring and work six single crochets into it.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.summary: Work single crochet, increase three times around.
rounds.title: Round 2

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 3

rounds.summary: Work two single crochets, increase three times around.
rounds.title: Round 4

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 5

rounds.rawInstruction: Round 6: sc (both loops), in flo of next st (hdc, 2 dc, hdc) to form first ear, sc 3 (both loops), in flo of next st (hdc, 2 dc, hdc) to form second ear, sc 6 (both loops). (18)
rounds.summary: Form the ears by working stitches in the front loop only.
rounds.title: Round 6

rounds.rawInstruction: Round 7: sc (both loops), bend first ear forward and sc in blo of st from round 5, sc 3 (both loops), bend second ear forward and sc in blo of st from round 5, sc 6 (both loops). (12)
rounds.summary: Bend ears forward and work stitches into the back loop of a previous round.
rounds.title: Round 7

rounds.summary: Work single crochet, increase six times around.
rounds.title: Round 8

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 9

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 10

rounds.summary: Work five single crochets, increase three times around.
rounds.title: Round 11

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 12

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 13

rounds.summary: Work six single crochets, increase four times around.
rounds.title: Round 14

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 15

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 16

rounds.summary: Single crochet in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 17

rounds.summary: Work two single crochets, decrease six times around.
rounds.title: Round 18

rounds.summary: Work single crochet, decrease six times around.
rounds.title: Round 19

rounds.summary: Add catnip and stuffing to the toy before closing.
rounds.title: Add catnip and stuffing

rounds.rawInstruction: Round 20: dec 3, ch 15, starting in 2nd ch from hook sc across chs, dec 3. (20)
rounds.summary: Decrease three times, chain 15 for tail, single crochet back along chain, decrease three times.
rounds.title: Round 20

rounds.summary: Fasten off yarn and sew the opening closed.
rounds.title: Finish off and sew closed
